{{- warnf "call %s" templates.Current.Name }} {{- $storageKey := default "huggingface-data-theme" site.Params.huggingface.storageKey }} {{- $params := dict "storageKey" $storageKey }} {{- with resources.Get "js/theme-toggle.js" }} {{- with . | js.Build (dict "params" (dict "storageKey" $storageKey)) }} {{- warnf "load %s" . }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "js.Build failed for %s" . }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "JS not found: js/theme-toggle.js" . }} {{- end }}
